[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111 4
1 0000000 a
2 1001000 2
3 1110100 4
4 1110110 5
5 0000110 2
6 1001000 2
7 0000100 1

01 10 1010001 3
12 21 1110101 5
23 32 0010111 4 match 0
34 43 0000000 a match 1

56 65 0000000 a match 1
67 76 1100000 2
70 07 1001010 3

71 17 1100100 3

61 16 1110000 3
72 27 1100110 4
